posts.raw_content:
...absentee ballots applied for in advance would be the exception and would be available to the elderly or those who know they will not be in town on election day.  A affidavit should be required to obtained and the absentee ballot should require notarization.

Edit:

Has been pointed out in several replies that in-person early voting for a reasonable period would be acceptable.  Would agree with that suggestion.

One reply suggested weekend in-person voting on 2 designated weekends prior to an election.  Would assume the results would have to be confidential until after election day with security measures monitored by partisan observers.

Edit:

Has been pointed out in several replies that in-person early voting for a reasonable period would be acceptable. Would agree with that suggestion.
